title: Genetics and DNA: Central Dogma — DNA → RNA → Protein
author: BiosystemsHub Editorial Team
description: Explore the central dogma of molecular biology: how DNA provides instructions that are transcribed into RNA and translated into proteins, the building blocks of life.

title: Genetics and DNA: How Traits Get Passed Down
author: BiosystemsHub Editorial Team
description: Understand how inherited and learned traits differ, and explore the role of dominant and recessive genes in shaping observable characteristics.

title: Genetics and DNA: What is DNA? What are Genes?
author: BiosystemsHub Editorial Team
description: A clear introduction to DNA structure, gene function, and the genetic mechanisms behind traits such as eye color and blood type.
